lex.bot.promptspecification.CfnAbout: Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex sends to a user to elicit a response.

lex.bot.promptspecification.AllowInterru.Description: Indicates whether the user can interrupt a speech prompt from the bot.

lex.bot.promptspecification.MaxRetries.Description: The maximum number of times the bot tries to elicit a response from the user using this prompt.

lex.bot.promptspecification.MessageGroup.Description: A collection of messages that Amazon Lex can send to the user. Amazon Lex chooses the actual message to send at runtime.

lex.bot.promptspecification.MessageSelec.Description: Indicates how a message is selected from a message group among retries.

lex.bot.promptspecification.PromptAttemp.Description: Specifies the advanced settings on each attempt of the prompt.
